data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Auto-reminders for incomplete items', but the evidence provided does not confirm that such reminders are implemented for all tasks. While the linked use case mentions an automated reminder for starting bowel prep, it does not provide comprehensive evidence that all incomplete items trigger reminders, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage. The lack of explicit evidence for reminders on all tasks leads to the conclusion that the requirement is not fully satisfied.
gaps: No evidence that auto-reminders are implemented for all incomplete checklist items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for auto-reminders implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that verify reminders for all incomplete items.
